label_claim_defects.defect: All three named horizons currently store the same next-observation midpoint delta, not mechanically fixed 60/300/900-second exits.
label_claim_defects.impact: Prior forward-quote family cannot support fixed-horizon promotion claims.

label_claim_defects.defect: Promotion-adjacent scoring used midpoint direction, not after-cost executable returns.
label_claim_defects.impact: Accuracy > 50% on mid direction is not executable EV.

label_claim_defects.defect: Retired after 8/18 correct paper labels and calibration error ~0.53.
label_claim_defects.impact: Do not resurrect under a new name.
